text:
There once was a girl named Lily who loved collecting butterfly wings. She wandered through gardens and forests in search of magnificent specimens to add to her prized collection. One day, she noticed a butterfly fluttering through the twilight. Its wings were unlike anything she'd ever seen. A gentle wind lifted the wings, revealing an intricate pattern. Fascinated, Lily followed the butterfly into a quiet forest clearing. There, nestled in a blossoming bush, lay the butterfly’s eggs. Lily realized then that these werens merely wings—it was beauty incarnate. She gathered as many eggs as she could carry and returned home, eager to protect them from predators.

That night, as she placed them under a protecting glass, Lily fell asleep. The next morning, she woke to an odd buzzing. She listened carefully and heard nothing. Then, a tiny creature appeared. It was a baby dronefly, whose delicate wings had vibrated with the night’s dreams. Lily felt a connection. She named the baby dronefly
